mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.nickname AS writer FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE r.post_no = #{postNo} AND r.post_board = #{postBoard} AND r.status = 'Y' ORDER BY r.create_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply (reply_no, content, create_date, status, post_board, post_no, member_no) VALUES (SEQ_RNO.NEXTVAL, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{postBoard}, #{postNo}, #{memberNo})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND post_board = #{postBoard} AND status = 'Y'

SELECT p.REPLY_NO AS replyNo, p.CONTENT AS content, p.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, p.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate, p.STATUS AS status, p.POST_BOARD AS postBoard, p.POST_NO AS postNo, p.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, p.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus FROM ( SELECT r.REPLY_NO, r.CONTENT, r.CREATE_DATE, r.MODIFY_DATE, r.STATUS, r.POST_BOARD, r.POST_NO, r.MEMBER_NO, RP.REPORT_STATUS FROM reply r LEFT JOIN REPORT RP ON r.REPLY_NO = RP.TARGET_NO AND RP.TARGET_TYPE = 'reply' AND RP.REPORT_STATUS = 'N' WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} AND r.post_board = #{postBoard} AND r.status = 'Y' ORDER BY r.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY ) p ORDER BY p.CREATE_DATE DESC
